arts.ttl: Chelsea star makes Mason Mount feelings clear after Man Utd star's heartfelt message
arts.sum: Mason Mount has endured a number of injury problems since joining Manchester United from Chelsea with his latest issue set to rule him out of Ruben Amorim's plans for several weeks

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Romano names two Red Devils exits
arts.sum: Manchester United players Christian Eriksen and Victor Lindelof are available for sale in the January transfer window, Fabrizio Romano has revealed. Both have previously struggled with injuries, something which is the story for a number of United players.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star Amad has made Marcus Rashford feelings clear after snubbing Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United's derby day hero Amad has previously admitted that the best player he has worked with at Old Trafford is one who was omitted from the matchday squad at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Erik ten Hag's key difference identified by Man Utd rival
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Bournemouth to Old Trafford this weekend and Adoni Iraola has already seen a difference in his opposition since Ruben Amorim replaced Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Man United 'make Marcus Rashford loan decision' amid Arsenal, Chelsea speculation
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly willing to let Marcus Rashford leave on loan in January but will not sanction a move to a Premier League club.

arts.ttl: How Man Utd dressing room reacted to Mason Mount injury setback as Bruno Fernandes stance clear
arts.sum: Mason Mount sharing an emotional statement on Instagram about his latest injury setback has led to multiple Manchester United teammates responding on social media

arts.ttl: “Never wanted to leave” – Bournemouth man reveals decision to join club, has no regrets about move
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen has started to make an impact at Bournemouth in the last few weeks. He’s started the last three games in the Premier League and also scored his first goal for the club against Tottenham Hotspur. While Huijsen’s start to life at Bournemouth was slow.his situation now looks much brighter under manager Andoni Iraola. The post “Never wanted to leave” – Bournemouth man reveals decision to join club, has no regrets about move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca opens door to three Chelsea January exits - and it's good news for Man Utd
arts.sum: Chelsea could trim their squad in the January transfer window with Enzo Maresca expecting players to ask to leave after not playing much football so far this season

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United dubbed 'very average' amid mixed Bournemouth predictions
arts.sum: The pundits have offered some varying predictions ahead of Manchester United vs Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Amorim wants Osimhen at Man Utd; Barcelona eye Lautaro
arts.sum: Saturday's football transfer rumours include Victor Osimhen, Lautaro Martinez, Marcus Rashford, Jules Kounde, Viktor Gyokeres, Benjamin Sesko and more.
